mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher_message ( message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, student_id, parent_id, subject, content, from_role, reply_to_id, is_read, replied, reply_content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{studentId}, #{parentId}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{fromRole}, #{replyToId}, #{isRead}, #{replied}, #{replyContent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher_message SET is_read = #{isRead}, replied = #{replied}, reply_content = #{replyContent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, student_id, parent_id, subject, content, from_role, reply_to_id, is_read, replied, reply_content, created_at, updated_at from_role, reply_to_id, is_read, replied, reply_content, created_at, updated_at FROM teacher_message WHERE message_id = #{messageId}

SELECT ci.counselor_id, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, ci.title, o.org_name AS college_name FROM counselor_info ci JOIN user u ON ci.counselor_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN organization o ON ci.college_id = o.org_id WHERE ci.is_psychological_instructor = 1 ORDER BY u.real_name ASC
